ddls:
CREATE TABLE "representations" (
  "representation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each representation */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the representation */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the representation (e.g., array, object) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the representation */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Whether the representation is required */,
  "translation" TEXT /* Translation information for the representation */,
  "viewer_link" TEXT /* Link to the viewer for the representation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the representation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the representation was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the representation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grid_representations" (
  "grid_representation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grid representation */,
  "representation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representation this grid representation belongs to */,
  "information" TEXT /* Information about grid objects in the resource */,
  "grid_size" INTEGER /* Size of the grid */,
  "cell_size" REAL /* Size of each cell in the grid */,
  "projection" TEXT /* Projection used for the grid representation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grid_representation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grid_representations_representation_id FOREIGN KEY ("representation_id") REFERENCES representations ("representation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vector_representations" (
  "vector_representation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vector representation */,
  "representation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representation this vector representation belongs to */,
  "information" TEXT /* Information about vector spatial objects in the resource */,
  "geometry_type" TEXT /* Type of geometry (e.g., point, line, polygon) */,
  "crs" TEXT /* Coordinate reference system used for the vector representation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vector_representation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vector_representations_representation_id FOREIGN KEY ("representation_id") REFERENCES representations ("representation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "georectified_representations" (
  "georectified_representation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each georectified representation */,
  "representation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representation this georectified representation belongs to */,
  "information" TEXT /* Information about georectified representations */,
  "georeference_model" TEXT /* Georeference model used for the representation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("georectified_representation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_georectified_representations_representation_id FOREIGN KEY ("representation_id") REFERENCES representations ("representation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "georeferenceable_representations" (
  "georeferenceable_representation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each georeferenceable representation */,
  "representation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representation this georeferenceable representation belongs to */,
  "information" TEXT /* Information about georeferenceable representations */,
  "georeference_model" TEXT /* Georeference model used for the representation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("georeferenceable_representation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_georeferenceable_representations_representation_id FOREIGN KEY ("representation_id") REFERENCES representations ("representation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation */,
  "representation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representation this translation belongs to */,
  "translation" TEXT /* Translation information for the representation */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the translation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_representation_id FOREIGN KEY ("representation_id") REFERENCES representations ("representation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewers" (
  "viewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewer */,
  "representation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representation this viewer belongs to */,
  "viewer_link" TEXT /* Link to the viewer for the representation */,
  "viewer_type" TEXT /* Type of viewer (e.g., 2D, 3D) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewers_representation_id FOREIGN KEY ("representation_id") REFERENCES representations ("representation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "representation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the representation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the representation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_representation_id FOREIGN KEY ("representation_id") REFERENCES representations ("representation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representation_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "representation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representation this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the representation */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the representation was versioned */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representation_versions_representation_id FOREIGN KEY ("representation_id") REFERENCES representations ("representation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "representation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representation this history entry belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representation_history_representation_id FOREIGN KEY ("representation_id") REFERENCES representations ("representation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representation_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representation_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "representation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representation this note belongs to */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representation_notes_representation_id FOREIGN KEY ("representation_id") REFERENCES representations ("representation_id")
)
